name: claude-orc
description: Peer discovery, agent roles, broadcast, and messaging for Claude Code instances (Windows/macOS/Linux). Fork of claude-peers-mcp.

scripts.build: bun build broker.ts --target=bun --outdir dist && bun build server.ts --target=node --outdir dist --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build cli.ts --target=bun --outdir dist
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
